message: Added register device url for ad-hoc-install page
Remove redundant comment from pauseForBackground
Remove balance UI — earbuds return unreliable data, old iOS app hides it
Fix balance: validate range in native parsers, hide UI when unavailable
Extract post-build action for upload, submit, and cleanup
Lower podspec iOS target to 15.1 to match Expo SDK 55 default
Drop location permission on Android 12+ (neverForLocation for BLE scan)
Centralize UUIDs, fix races, null context, cancellable reconnect delay
Add iOS debug logging, diagnostics in dev overlay, capture native module errors
Filter mock devices from scan list unless explicitly in dev/mock mode
Rewrite to BLE GATT (like iOS) — RFCOMM was fundamentally broken for writes
Add version label to dev overlay, fix exit dev mode not hiding overlay
Send raw V3 packets without RFCOMM frame wrapper
Skip V1 handshake — LIZN earbuds are V3-only, send LIZN commands directly
Initiate
Add GAIA version handshake, fix frame protocol version and checksum
Re-enable framing (earbuds require it), delay initial requestState
Initiate
Send raw GAIA packets over SPP (no framing), framing only for GAIA UUIDs
Check bonded devices by name before re-bonding (BLE random address changes)
Use device SDP UUIDs, try secure RFCOMM, cap reconnects, log outgoing
Trigger bonding via encrypted characteristic read instead of createBond
Fix bonding: keep GATT open during createBond, close after success
Add debug log copy button on connecting screen, show failure state
GATT-first bonding, debug log collector with copy-to-clipboard
Rewrite Android transport: BLE GATT → Classic RFCOMM for GAIA
Fix bonding race, receiver leak, Android 13+ compat
Fix Android pairing (createBond), dedup scan results, match reference UI labels
Fix Android BLE scanning, add shake-to-toggle mock for preview
Fix crash: link native earbuds module, fallback to mock when unavailable
Fix Expo upload command — eas upload with --build-path
Upload local builds to Expo (best-effort)
Exclude web from platforms — fix OTA export
Sync tab with device domain changes
Fix install page metadata — export shell vars for node
Fix Xcode version, ANDROID_HOME/JAVA_HOME, profile-based bundle IDs
